description: Shahid Beheshti University (SBU) is a major state research university in Tehran, Iran. Founded in 1959 as the National University of Iran, it was renamed after [Mohammad Beheshti](/people/mohammad-beheshti) following the 1979 revolution. It hosts a prominent nuclear engineering faculty whose staff were disproportionately affected by Israeli airstrikes in June 2025: [Abdolhamid Minouchehr](/people/abdolhamid-minouchehr), [Amir Hossein Faghihi](/people/amir-hossein-faghihi), and [Ahmad Reza Zolfaghari Daryani](/people/ahmad-reza-zolfaghari-daryani) were all killed on 13 June 2025.
editorial_notes: Founded 1959 as National University of Iran. Renamed after Beheshti post-revolution. Known for nuclear engineering programme.
